creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
On 2/8/07, Artem Naluzhny <tut@nhamon.com.ua> wrote:
> On Thu, 8 Feb 2007 16:01:28 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Maintainer of net/sipp,
> >
> > Please note that PR ports/108935 has just been submitted.
> >
> > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> > and a committer will take care of it.
>
> Approved.

Could you please also commit attached patch for the port (fixes
command line parameters usage for digest authentication).
